description_long: This object is a long, slender sword with a straight, single-edged blade and a matching sheath. The blade appears metallic, likely steel, with a pointed tip and a subtle taper along its length. The handle is straight and capped with a metallic pommel, featuring a grip that appears to be wrapped or covered in a dark material for improved handling. The sheath is similarly elongated, with metallic fittings at both ends and a dark body, possibly leather or lacquered wood. The sword and sheath both have minimal ornamentation, focusing on functional design with a few metallic accents. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian yet elegant weapon, suitable for display or practical use.
description: A straight, single-edged sword with a dark-wrapped handle and a matching sheath, both featuring metallic accents. The design is functional and elegant, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sword and sheath, highlighting the straight blade and metallic fittings.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the flatness of the blade and sheath, as well as the rectangular cross-section of the handle and sheath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the full length and the alignment of the blade and sheath, with metallic details visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the ends of the handle and sheath, showing the pommel and sheath cap details.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark-wrapped or covered, metallic pommel, rectangular cross-section
